prompt: Show a paginated list of vendors with name, category, total spend, status. Sortable.
expected_avoid: @tanstack/react-table v8 fresh import (basecamp may not already have it)
Firestore server-side composite sort (no composite indexes for these collections — in-memory only)
expected_use: in-memory sort/filter on the fetched array (capped ~1,000 docs)
Plus Jakarta Sans (already wired via next/font/google)
expected_pattern_ref: Adaptation Layer — next-basecamp-web shadcn + Firestore in-memory (rules L416, L423); Decision tree — Tables (rules L31-35)
context_notes: On basecamp the canonical table is shadcn Table, not @dash/data-table — repo's resident UI lib wins. Pagination is necessary client-side because Firestore has no composite indexes for these collections.
